name: ReasoningDisplay
description: Collapsible chain-of-thought block for AI reasoning traces.

api.name: ReasoningDisplay
api.description: Collapsible chain-of-thought block for AI reasoning traces.

parameters.name: Markdown
parameters.description: Renders Text as markdown instead of plain text — reasoning traces from models are usually markdown (lists, bold, code). Uses MarkdownRenderer when supplied, otherwise the built-in dependency-free CommonMark subset. Pairs naturally with Detailed. (#305)

parameters.name: MarkdownRenderer
parameters.description: Optional render hook converting the raw markdown Text into a MarkupString (plug in Markdig etc.). The delegate must return SAFE HTML — sanitise untrusted input. Ignored unless Markdown is true.

enums.name: ReasoningVariant
enums.description: Default = standard expand/collapse display. Compact = summary label + collapsed body limited to 3 lines. Detailed = always shows full body text with extra padding.

examples.title: Streaming State
examples.code:
<ReasoningDisplay Text="@_partialText" IsStreaming="@_streaming" DefaultOpen="true" />

@code {
    private string _partialText = string.Empty;
    private bool _streaming;
}

mdSummary:
# ReasoningDisplay

Collapsible chain-of-thought block for AI reasoning traces.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** AI
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/reasoning-display

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ReasoningDisplay | Text | `string?` | `` |  |
| ReasoningDisplay | IsStreaming | `bool` | `` |  |
| ReasoningDisplay | Summary | `string?` | `` |  |
| ReasoningDisplay | DurationMs | `long?` | `` |  |
| ReasoningDisplay | DefaultOpen | `bool` | `` |  |
| ReasoningDisplay | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` |  |
| ReasoningDisplay | Variant | `ReasoningVariant` | `ReasoningVariant.Default` |  |
| ReasoningDisplay | Markdown | `bool` | `` | Renders Text as markdown instead of plain text — reasoning traces from models are usually markdown (lists, bold, code). Uses MarkdownRenderer when supplied, otherwise the built-in dependency-free CommonMark subset. Pairs naturally with Detailed. (#305) |
| ReasoningDisplay | MarkdownRenderer | `Func<string, MarkupString>?` | `` | Optional render hook converting the raw markdown Text into a MarkupString (plug in Markdig etc.). The delegate must return SAFE HTML — sanitise untrusted input. Ignored unless Markdown is true. |
| ReasoningDisplay | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ReasoningDisplay | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
